subject: [PATCH v4 4/4] sunrpc: remove unused svc_version vs_count field

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch removes the unused vs_count field from struct svc_version and its associated percpu counters across various NFS-related modules, including lockd and nfsd. The removal is justified by the fact that svc_seq_show() and the nfsd netlink stats handler now use the per-netns svc_stat vs_count arrays instead of the global per-version counters. This change simplifies the code and reduces memory usage.
